name: Lemon Squeezy
description: Lemon Squeezy merchant-of-record API for digital products, stores, products, variants, checkouts, orders, subscriptions, customers, license keys, discounts, and webhooks.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Lemon Squeezy API key from Settings > API.

tools.name: list_stores
tools.description: List stores available to the API key.

tools.name: get_store
tools.description: Retrieve one Lemon Squeezy store.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products. Filter by store_id to find products for a specific store.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Retrieve one product.

tools.name: list_variants
tools.description: List product variants. Filter by product_id when creating checkouts.

tools.name: get_variant
tools.description: Retrieve one variant.

tools.name: create_checkout
tools.description: Create a hosted checkout. Body must be Lemon Squeezy JSON:API format with data.type='checkouts', relationships.store, relationships.variant, and attributes such as checkout_options, product_options, checkout_data, expires_at, preview.

body.description: Raw Lemon Squeezy JSON:API checkout create payload.

tools.name: get_checkout
tools.description: Retrieve one checkout.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List orders. Filter by store_id, user_email, or status when reconciling sales.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Retrieve one order.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List customers. Filter by store_id or email.

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List subscriptions. Filter by store_id, order_id, product_id, variant_id, user_email, or status.

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Retrieve one subscription.

tools.name: update_subscription
tools.description: Update a subscription using Lemon Squeezy JSON:API format. Use for pause, resume, cancel at period end, variant changes, billing anchor, invoice_soon, or metadata updates.

tools.name: list_license_keys
tools.description: List license keys. Filter by store_id, order_id, order_item_id, product_id, user_email, or status.

tools.name: get_license_key
tools.description: Retrieve one Lemon Squeezy license key.

tools.name: list_license_instances
tools.description: List license key activation instances. Filter by license_key_id when auditing where a key is activated.

tools.name: get_license_instance
tools.description: Retrieve one Lemon Squeezy license instance.

tools.name: list_order_items
tools.description: List Lemon Squeezy order items. Useful for seeing exactly which product/variant was purchased.

tools.name: get_order_item
tools.description: Retrieve one Lemon Squeezy order item.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List Lemon Squeezy downloadable file records for digital products. Use this to inspect hosted audio/download files already attached in Lemon Squeezy. Public API docs expose file read/list, not direct file upload/create; use Gumroad or an external storage flow if an agent must upload audio bytes programmatically.

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Retrieve one Lemon Squeezy file record. This returns metadata for an existing hosted downloadable file; it does not upload a new audio file.

tools.name: list_discounts
tools.description: List Lemon Squeezy discounts. Filter by store_id when managing promotions.

tools.name: get_discount
tools.description: Retrieve one Lemon Squeezy discount.

tools.name: create_discount
tools.description: Create a Lemon Squeezy discount. Body must be Lemon Squeezy JSON:API data.type='discounts' with relationships.store and provider-supported attributes such as name, code, amount, amount_type, duration, duration_in_months, max_redemptions, starts_at, expires_at.

tools.name: delete_discount
tools.description: Delete a Lemon Squeezy discount.

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List webhooks configured in Lemon Squeezy.

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Create a Lemon Squeezy webhook. Body must be JSON:API data.type='webhooks' with relationships.store and attributes.url/events/secret/test_mode.

tools.name: delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a Lemon Squeezy webhook.

registration.manual_setup: Lemon Squeezy webhooks require a JSON:API body with relationships.store and attributes.url/events/secret/test_mode. Use lemon-squeezy_create_webhook for programmatic setup when you know the store ID and desired event list.

events.name: order_created
events.description: Sent when an order is created.

events.name: subscription_created
events.description: Sent when a subscription is created.

events.name: subscription_updated
events.description: Sent when a subscription is updated.

events.name: subscription_cancelled
events.description: Sent when a subscription is cancelled.

events.name: subscription_resumed
events.description: Sent when a subscription is resumed.

events.name: license_key_created
events.description: Sent when a license key is created.
